cloudflare-api.note: Optional Cloudflare API MCP server, disabled by default. Enable it only when the app needs Cloudflare services, then use OAuth on first connection or optional bearer-token auth for automation. Useful for app endpoints, proxies, and service orchestration.

stitch.note: Google Stitch MCP server for concept generation and editing. In Codex, create the key in Google Stitch Settings and expose it as STITCH_API_KEY; the generic OAuth Authenticate action is not the setup path for this server.
